title: Tropical Coconut
subtitle: Freezer Smoothie Pack
description: A rich tropical smoothie with pineapple, mango, and coconut milk — slightly higher carbs for flavor variety, with protein from cottage cheese and Greek yogurt.

steps.title: Prep the bag
steps.text: Add all bag contents to a zip-lock or reusable freezer bag:
steps.note: Seal and freeze. These keep for up to 3 months.

steps.title: Blend
steps.text: Add the frozen bag contents to a blender, then pour in:
bullets: ½ cup lite canned coconut milk
¼ cup plain full-fat Greek yogurt
steps.note: Blend on high for 45–60 seconds until completely smooth. The chia seeds will thicken it slightly.

notes.title: Carbs
notes.body: 28g net carbs is higher than most of the other smoothies — the pineapple and mango drive that. Worth it for flavor variety; just account for it if you're watching intake closely.

notes.title: Coconut milk
notes.body: Use lite canned coconut milk, not the carton kind. It blends in creamier and has a more distinct coconut flavor without spiking the fat too high.

notes.title: Freezer Prep
notes.body: Make a week's worth of bags at once. The chia seeds go in the bag dry — they'll hydrate when you blend.

notes.title: Color
notes.body: The spinach will shift the color greenish-yellow. Flavor stays tropical.
